name: vote
description: Vote for the bot on top.gg (support the project).

name: ping
description: Check if the bot is alive (latency).

name: link
description: Link your Discord account with your E-Forge profile.

name: portal
description: E-Forge portal + how to earn Ghost Tokens on Discord.

name: ai
description: Ask the AI (remembers conversation context, with a daily limit).

name: describe
description: Let the AI describe an attached image.

name: remind
description: Set a reminder after a given time.

name: reactionpanel
description: Publish a reaction-role panel (embed from the dashboard) + auto-reactions.

name: buttonpanel
description: Send a button role panel (configured from the web dashboard).

name: pricealert
description: Personal game price alerts (DM on price drop).

name: prestige
description: Advance to a higher prestige (reset XP for a badge).

name: profile
description: Your profile: level, balance, invites and badges.

name: quests
description: Your daily and weekly quests + claim rewards.

name: ticketpanel
description: Send a ticket-opening panel to the current channel.

name: verifypanel
description: Send a verification panel to the current channel.

name: suggest
description: Submit a suggestion for the server.

name: poll
description: Create a poll — native Discord poll with a timer.

name: highlight
description: DM alerts for keywords in chat.

name: tldr
description: Summarize recent messages in this channel (AI).

name: translate
description: Translate text into a chosen language (AI).

name: imagine
description: Generate an image from a prompt (AI / OpenAI).

name: backlog
description: Your backlog of games to play.

name: hof
description: Hall of Fame of leveling seasons.

name: fun
description: Fun: truth or dare, would you rather, 8ball, dice.

name: linktwitch
description: Link your Twitch login (role for subscription).

name: lottery
description: Server lottery — the pot grows with tickets.

name: ask
description: Ask the AI a one-off question (no memory).

name: rewrite
description: Rewrite text in a chosen style (AI).

name: trivia
description: Knowledge quiz — first correct answer wins the reward!

name: confess
description: Send an anonymous confession in this channel.

name: rps
description: Rock, paper, scissors against the bot.

name: flip
description: Flip a coin — heads or tails.

name: sticky
description: Pin a message that sticks to the bottom of the channel.

name: farewell
description: Goodbye messages and server boost thank-yous.

name: persona
description: AI bot personality — the reply style for /ai and /ask.

name: healthcheck
description: Audit your server security and setup.

name: roleperms
description: Set role permissions from a preset.

name: rolecopy
description: Copy one role settings to another.

name: blueprint
description: Create a ready set of channels from a template.

name: aiserver
description: AI designs and builds your server layout from a description.

name: ship
description: Check how well two people match. 💘

name: panic
description: PANIC MODE — server lockdown + join block.

name: vanityrole
description: Role for a phrase/link in the status.

name: stocks
description: Stock market — buy and sell virtual shares.

name: pet
description: Pet — adopt, feed and collect gifts.

name: meme
description: Generate a meme — text on a template.
